testsuite.name: findAvailableTasksWithHardConstraint — Hard Constraint 필터링

testcase.name: 엣지 케이스: 다른 유저의 Task는 조회되지 않음
에너지 경계: MEDIUM 유저는 LOW·MEDIUM 태스크 모두 조회 가능
PENDING 외 상태(COMPLETED, SNOOZED)는 조회에서 제외
정상 케이스: 에너지·시간 조건을 모두 충족하는 Task만 반환
시간 경계: 예상 소요시간 == 가용시간인 Task는 포함
엣지 케이스: 조건에 맞는 Task가 없으면 빈 리스트 반환

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-19T12:50:20.861+09:00 INFO 16165 --- [ Test worker] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.teamsigma.taskmanager.repository.TaskRepositoryTest$HardConstraintFilterTest]: HardConstraintFilterTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-19T12:50:20.863+09:00 INFO 16165 --- [ Test worker] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.teamsigma.taskmanager.TaskManagerApplication for test class com.teamsigma.taskmanager.repository.TaskRepositoryTest$HardConstraintFilterTest Hibernate: insert into users (email,nickname,id) values (?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into users (email,nickname,id) values (?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.deadline,t1_0.delay_count,t1_0.description,t1_0.estimated_minutes,t1_0.importance,t1_0.required_energy,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and t1_0.status='PENDING' and t1_0.estimated_minutes<=? and case t1_0.required_energy when 'LOW' then 0 when 'MEDIUM' then 1 when 'HIGH' then 2 end<=case ? when 'LOW' then 0 when 'MEDIUM' then 1 when 'HIGH' then 2 end order by t1_0.deadline asc nulls last Hibernate: insert into users (email,nickname,id) values (?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.deadline,t1_0.delay_count,t1_0.description,t1_0.estimated_minutes,t1_0.importance,t1_0.required_energy,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? where id=?
